---
title: "Guide for writing good functions in R"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-03-11"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "R"
  - "Stats"
---

Have you ever wondered how the heck do the programmers of R write the code behind the summary function? Have you noted that summary performs well in a vector, linear model, anova, etc. Well, I am right now writing an R package to compute sample sizes under different scenarios and [this guide](http://cran.r-project.org/doc/contrib/Leisch-CreatingPackages.pdf) was very useful to me.
